lord of Bhukti too is the owner of the Lagna. On the day of
death the Sun had just entered Virgo, the 7th house from the
natal Ascendant afflicted by Saturn. In this case too the Lagna
of death coincides with the position of natal Moon, who has
gone to the 7th house viz. Cancer, from her original position.
The star on the latter day was again Aslesa, Vadhatara;

74 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
Case V Male born at MS A.M. on 18/19-7-1950—died on
11-10-1950. Balance of Sukra-Dasa was 15 yrs 5m. 11 d.
Explanation :—There is Kesariyoga, Parivartana between the
luminaries,and both Jupiter and Moon have Vargottainamsa. Still
the child could not survive even Ml three months. Why ? As I
have said elsewhere. Yogas will be effective only if the native
has a long lease of life, and not otherwise. In this example
Rahu is in the 12th opposed by Mars and Ketu from the 6th.
This is a powerful cause for Balarista. The Moon is conjoined
